people.headline: Technical Officer | Marketing Operations | Research & Analytics
people.summary: Experienced in the software development life cycle, Agile and Scrum methodologies, requirements analysis, marketing operations, qualitative research, and stakeholder communication across cross-functional environments.

experience.title: Technical Officer
experience.description: Supported learner identification from RMG worker groups and contributed to nutrition training and app-related requirements work.
responsibilities: Provided support to identify learners from RMG worker groups for nutrition training.
Assisted with baseline surveys and impact assessments.
Prepared and updated requirements analysis, functional specifications, and model templates for a nutrition-based app.

experience.title: Marketing Operations Specialist
experience.description: Coordinated campaigns, communication streams, reporting, proposals, and product/user research for an LSM platform.
responsibilities: Coordinated campaigns and communication streams for target segments.
Used analytics to measure and report marketing campaigns and manage user acquisitions.
Prepared proposals, presentations, and marketing materials.
Developed cases and identified business needs during the design of an LSM platform.

experience.title: Qualitative Research Associate
experience.description: Conducted qualitative market research and trained field research teams.
responsibilities: Analyzed usage patterns and customer behavior across rural, urban, concept, and ideation studies.
Built field research teams by providing training and guidance on data analysis and implications.

experience.title: Accounts & Finance Assistant
experience.description: Part-time finance and operations support role.
responsibilities: Assisted in maintaining financial databases and retrieving information as needed.
Assisted with maintaining operational documents for day-to-day work.

experience.title: Field Research

responsibilities: Conducted focus groups, observations, and ethnographic research methods.
Provided ad-hoc and regular analysis and reports to support research studies.

Mohammad Fayaz Zian Technical Officer Marketing Operations Specialist Qualitative Research Associate.
Experience in software development life cycle, Agile, Scrum, requirements analysis, functional specifications, nutrition-based app model templates, marketing campaigns, analytics, proposals, market research, field research, data analysis, finance assistance.

people.headline: Experienced Software Programmer
people.summary: Analytical Software Programmer with advanced skills in complex programming tasks, testing, correcting, and revising web-based programs. Proficient in PHP/MySQL, HTML, and JavaScript with 9+ years of experience.

experience.title: Software Programmer
experience.description: Created, delivered, and maintained scalable architecture and ERP/web applications using PHP/MySQL.
responsibilities: Created, delivered, and maintained scalable system architecture for high-availability internet sites and internal applications.
Wrote ERP applications based on PHP/MySQL in hybrid architecture for industry.
Monitored and updated back-end data by communicating between PHP clients and MySQL.
Directed ERP software design and development across a 1-10 member team.
Coached interns and new employees.
Coded 10+ websites using PHP/MySQL.
Built, tested, and deployed scalable, highly available, modular software products.

experience.title: Outsource Staff
experience.description: Worked on website portals, social media pages, SEO strategies, product upgrades, and web development.
responsibilities: Helped clients develop website portals and social media pages.
Built, implemented, and updated SEO strategies.
Collected requirements from customers and business partners for product upgrades and new product development.
Created dynamic websites and eliminated website bugs.
Submitted weekly progress reports against KPI objectives.

experience.title: IT Executive
experience.description: Handled computer hardware, network systems, server, and device support.
responsibilities: Identified computer hardware and network system issues and performed troubleshooting.
Supported network design, reevaluation, and optimization.
Monitored network capacity and performance and resolved complex network problems.
Maintained servers, computers, printers, cables, and other equipment.

people.searchText:
Abbas Uddin Experienced Software Programmer. Analytical Software Programmer with advanced skills performing complex programming tasks, testing, correcting and revising web-based programs.
Experience includes Software Programmer at AKIJ Online Ltd, Outsource Staff at UpWork/ODesk, and IT Executive at a local IT firm in Jessore.
Skills: web development, HTML5, CSS, JavaScript, PHP, Java, ASP, Node.js, jQuery, PHP/MySQL, CodeIgniter, Laravel, Core PHP, MySQL, PostgreSQL, Oracle, SQLite, MongoDB, Redis, Linux, Ubuntu, Windows, Visual Studio, Dreamweaver, NetBeans, Code::Blocks, Eclipse, VirtualBox, VMware, Hyper-V, Arduino, Raspberry Pi, SEO, ERP development, network troubleshooting.
Education: Bachelor of Science in CSE, European University of Bangladesh; Diploma in Computer Science and Application, Bangladesh Open University. Certifications: CCNA, Diploma in Multimedia Graphic Design. Languages: Bengali, English, Arabic.

people.headline: Junior Front-End React.js Developer

projects.name: Gents Parlour

projects.name: Dev Town
projects.description: Front-end project created with React Redux. Users can create a team with developers, add or remove developers from the cart, and see adjusted cart pricing on a responsive UI.

projects.name: Mobile Shopping Cart
projects.description: Front-end shopping cart project created with Context API and reducer. Supports item increment/decrement, total price update, responsive UI, and React custom scrollbar.

people.searchText:
Kamon Ahmed Junior front-end React.js developer based in Rangamati, Bangladesh.
Skills: JavaScript, ES6, React, Node.js, REST API, Material-UI, MongoDB, Bootstrap4, React Bootstrap, JSON, HTML, CSS, Photoshop, Redux, TypeScript, Express.js, Illustrator, NPM, VS Code, Notepad++, Chrome DevTools, Heroku, Netlify, Firebase, Postman.
Projects: Gents Parlour full-stack project with admin and regular user roles, protected order flow, responsive UI, transition effects, dynamic services and reviews. Dev Town frontend React Redux project to create a team with developers and cart pricing. Mobile Shopping Cart frontend project using Context API and reducer with responsive UI and custom scrollbar.
Education: Bachelor of Business Studies, Rangamati Govt College and University; Programming Hero complete web development course. Award: Black Belt.

experience.title: Junior Front-End Developer
experience.description: Built optimized landing pages and websites using React.js, HTML, and CSS while contributing to Agile ceremonies and client requirement discussions.
responsibilities: Manipulated and implemented object-oriented programming models.
Contributed to daily scrum meetings with team updates.
Gathered and defined customer requirements and project specifications.
Built responsive landing pages and websites with cross-browser compatibility.
Collaborated with stakeholders during development to confirm design best practices.
Managed design tasks from conception to completion.
Responded to client queries and maintained project documents.

experience.title: Intern Front-End Developer
experience.description: Worked as a front-end intern in an Agile-driven environment, contributing to landing pages, website content, stakeholder collaboration, and project documentation.
responsibilities: Managed full-cycle design tasks while maintaining guidelines.
Created unique spaces for marketing ads within landing pages.
Worked in an Agile-driven environment to maintain project timelines.
Contributed to content creation for the company website.
Analyzed problems, identified solutions, and made decisions.
Carried out day-to-day duties accurately and efficiently.

experience.title: Student Tutor
experience.description: Provided one-to-one tutoring support for A-level and O-level students through in-person, online, and instant appointment options.
responsibilities: Applied different teaching techniques to improve student grades and confidence.
Planned lessons to strengthen weak subjects and build skills.
Collaborated with students to complete assignments and identify learning gaps.

experience.title: Teacher Assistant
experience.description: Supported student learning objectives through personalized and small-group assistance.
responsibilities: Reviewed lesson material with students individually or in groups.
Worked with the lead teacher to monitor class schedule and attendance.
Provided classroom and exam invigilation support.
